/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/test_arm_kernels_standalone.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/lite/backends/arm/math/conv_winograd_3x3.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/lite/backends/arm/math/gemm_prepacked_int8.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/lite/backends/arm/math/gemv_arm_int8.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/lite/backends/arm/math/lstm.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/lite/backends/arm/math/norm.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/lite/backends/arm/math/packed_sgemm.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/lite/backends/arm/math/sgemm.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/lite/backends/arm/math/sgemv.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/lite/kernels/arm/activation_compute.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/lite/kernels/arm/batch_norm_compute.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/lite/kernels/arm/conv_compute.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/lite/kernels/arm/elementwise_compute.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/lite/kernels/arm/fc_compute.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/lite/kernels/arm/group_norm_compute.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/lite/kernels/arm/gru_compute.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/lite/kernels/arm/instance_norm_compute.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/lite/kernels/arm/layer_norm_compute.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/lite/kernels/arm/lstm_compute.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_arm_kernels_real.dir/lite/kernels/arm/matmul_compute.cc.o -o test_arm_kernels_real  -lm
